2.name: [2] Anesthetic Touch/Gift of Sleep
2.description: (Healer/Warrior) Remove feelings of pain from a target or put a living creature to sleep Auguring the Sickness : (Healer) Discover the severity and nature of a sickness plaguing a target Peaceful Touch : (Watcher) Calm a hostile target with a touch, making it harder for him to strike you

3.name: [3] Burning Touch
3.description: (Warrior) Cause a victim to feel debilitating agony and may cause Rötschreck in vampire victims Peacemaker : (Healer/Watcher) Spread an aura of calm and peace Healer's Touch : (Healer) Heal wounds of a mortal or a vampire with a touch, including bloodborne diseases Pariah's Caress : (Watcher) Mark a target with a bloody touch, making all his social interactions harder

4.name: [4] Armor of Caine's Fury
4.description: (Warrior) Create mystical armor that protects you from harm and makes it easier to avoid fear Frenzy Ending the Watch : (Warrior) Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die King David's Blessing : (Healer) Through song or playing an instrument, help someone forget their physical pain, draw them out of depression, or assist another healer in their craft Shepherd's Watch : (Healer) Create a shield around the vampire that enemies cannot cross Peacemaker : (Watcher) Spread an aura of calm and peace, like the level 3 power above

4.name: Armor of Caine's Fury
4.description: Fury : (Warrior) Create mystical armor that protects you from harm and makes it easier to avoid fear Frenzy Ending the Watch : (Warrior) Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die King David's Blessing : (Healer) Through song or playing an instrument, help someone forget their physical pain, draw them out of depression, or assist another healer in their craft Shepherd's Watch : (Healer) Create a shield around the vampire that enemies cannot cross Peacemaker : (Watcher) Spread an aura of calm and peace, like the level 3 power above

4.description: (Healer) Create a shield around the vampire that enemies cannot cross
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 260

5.name: [5] Ending the Watch
5.description: (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die and draw knowledge or energy from it Vengeance of Samiel : (Warrior) Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided The Ailing Spirit : (Healer) Cure subject's Derangements, but cannot cure its own Derangements. Can bring temporary lucidity to a Malkavian. Unburden the Bestial Soul : (Healer) Draw someone's soul out and improve the subject's Path rating, raise the subject's Virtues (Conscience, Courage, and Self-Control), lower them (Conviction and Instinct), and cure Derangements Soul's Breath : (Watcher) Subsist on mortals' breaths instead of blood, or steal blood and power from other supernatural creatures through their breath

5.name: Ending the Watch
5.description: (Warrior) Painlessly kill a mortal who wants to die
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 263

5.name: Soul's Breath
5.description: (Watcher) Subsist on mortals' breaths instead of blood, or steal blood and power from other supernatural creatures through their breath
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

5.name: The Ailing Spirit
5.description: (Healer) Cure subject's Derangements, but cannot cure its own Derangements. Can bring temporary lucidity to a Malkavian.

5.name: Unburden the Bestial Soul
5.description: (Healer) Draw someone's soul out and improve the subject's Path rating, raise the subject's Virtues (Conscience, Courage, and Self-Control), lower them (Conviction and Instinct), and cure Derangements
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

5.name: Vengeance of Samiel
5.description: (Warrior) Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 474-475

6.name: [6] Blissful Agony
6.description: (Warrior) Cause a victim to feel continuous pain that can cause damage or drive them to frenzy Dream Combat : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Draw the target's mind to a dreamscape Father's Judgement : (Healer) Render a portion of a vampire's vitae inert Samiel's Vengeance : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided against anyone who has struck the vampire Safe Passage : (Watcher) Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you. Warding the Beast : (Healer) Draw someone's soul out and improve the subject's Path rating, raise the subject's Virtues (Conscience, Courage, and Self-Control), lower them (Conviction and Instinct), and cure derangements Watching the Passage : (Warrior) Draw knowledge and energy from using Ending the Watch

6.name: Blissful Agony
6.description: gony : (Warrior) Cause a victim to feel continuous pain that can cause damage or drive them to frenzy Dream Combat : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Draw the target's mind to a dreamscape Father's Judgement : (Healer) Render a portion of a vampire's vitae inert Samiel's Vengeance : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided against anyone who has struck the vampire Safe Passage : (Watcher) Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you. Warding the Beast : (Healer) Draw someone's soul out and improve the subject's Path rating, raise the subject's Virtues (Conscience, Courage, and Self-Control), lower them (Conviction and Instinct), and cure derangements Watching the Passage : (Warrior) Draw knowledge and energy from using Ending the Watch
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 475

6.name: Dream Combat
6.description: (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Draw the target's mind to a dreamscape
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 264

6.name: Father's Judgement
6.description: (Healer) Render a portion of a vampire's vitae inert
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 261

6.name: Fiery Agony
6.description: (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Enhances Burning Touch , meaning that touch is only needed to activate Fiery Agony , continues as long as the vampire watches the target and makes it harder for vampire targets to resist Rötschreck
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 265

6.name: Safe Passage
6.description: (Watcher) Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you.
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 266

6.name: Samiel's Vengeance
6.description: (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Make a single devastating blow that cannot be avoided against anyone who has struck the vampire
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 264

6.name: Warding the Beast
6.description: (Healer) Draw someone's soul out and improve the subject's Path rating, raise the subject's Virtues (Conscience, Courage, and Self-Control), lower them (Conviction and Instinct), and cure derangements

6.name: Watching the Passage
6.description: (Warrior) Draw knowledge and energy from using Ending the Watch

7.name: [7] Aversion
7.description: (Warrior) Cause a crowd to greatly dislike an individual, to harass or avoid him Aversion : (Watcher) ( V20DA ) Enhances Pariah's Caress , causing others to greatly dislike and ostracize an individual, or turn hostile against him Blissful Gaze : (Healer) Gift of Sleep and Healer's Touch no longer need touch to work, and wound penalties are reversed when Healer's Touch is used Fiery Agony : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) Enhances Burning Touch , meaning that touch is only needed to activate Fiery Agony , continues as long as the vampire watches the target and makes it harder for vampire targets to resist Rötschreck Safe Passage : (Healer) Receive hospitality and help regardless of local culture, and make it harder for hunters to find you. Sword of the Righteous : (Healer/Warrior) Cause a blade blooded with your vitae to blaze with heavenly fire and deal aggravated damage

7.name: Sword of the Righteous
7.description: (Healer/Warrior) Cause a blade blooded with your vitae to blaze with heavenly fire and deal aggravated damage

8.name: [8] Purification
8.description: (Healer/Watcher) Expel or exorcise a spirit or a demon , and bind it to your service Rayzeel's Song : (Healer) Make it easier to heal others (see Rayzeel ) Shadow of Taint : (Warrior) Purge an individual of infernal possession and force such demons into nearby objects, animals or people Song of the Blooded : (Warrior) ( V20DA ) The vampire enters a battle trance, increasing her physical prowess, surrounding her with a glowing halo that blinds onlookers and rendering her immune to any mind influencing Disciplines (except for Rayzeel's Song )

8.name: Purification

9.name: [9] Heaven's Gate
9.description: (Healer) Resurrect a recently killed mortal as a Revenant Soul Exchange : (Watcher) Exchange the souls of two individuals, exchanging their Roads , Virtues , and Natures
